title: Shudehill Giftware Sweet Meadow Ceramic Tealight House, White and Green Decorative Candle Holder with Family Quote, Floral Design, (Height 10.7cm x Width 8.7cm x Depth 6.5cm)
features: DESIGN FEATURES: Charming house-shaped ceramic tealight holder with cut-out windows and a lovely green roof, perfect for creating a warm ambiance
DIMENSIONS: Compact size measuring 10.7 cm in height, 8.7 cm in width, and 6.5 cm in depth, ideal for any shelf or tabletop
ARTISTIC DETAILS: Beautiful floral meadow design featuring delicate wildflowers and butterflies adorning the base of the ceramic house
SENTIMENT: Features the touching quote 'Where life begins and love never ends' along with 'Family' text and decorative hearts
VERSATILE DECOR: Makes a thoughtful housewarming or family gift, suitable for use with standard tealight candles
description: Transform your living space with this charming ceramic tealight house from Shudehill Giftware's Sweet Meadow collection. Standing at 10.7cm tall, 8.7cm wide, and 6.5cm deep, this delightful white house-shaped candle holder features a lovely green roof and is adorned with beautiful floral illustrations along its base. The design includes delicate wildflowers and foliage in soft, natural colours that create a meadow-like scene. The heartwarming message 'where life begins and love never ends' is elegantly inscribed, making it a perfect decorative piece for family homes. Small windows and a heart detail add character to the design, while the hollow interior creates a magical glow when lit with a tealight candle. This decorative piece serves both as a practical candle holder and a charming ornament that celebrates family and home, perfect for adding a cosy touch to any room or making a thoughtful housewarming gift. Measurements: Height 10.7cm x Width 8.7cm x Depth 6.5cm.
